image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Science has a clearer story about vaccine myocarditis than social media.
Context visual: Vaccine myocarditis is rare, especially compared to the risk of COVID-19.
Escalation visual: Data shows higher rates in young males, but cases are still infrequent.
Evidence visual: Studies reveal myocarditis rates are much lower than risks of severe COVID.
Payoff visual: Informed choices protect us. Understanding risks empowers us.
Cta visual: Stay curious. Follow for more science insights!
